hero.name: Kier Vincent Larga
hero.intro: Turning chaos into clarity — one inbox, calendar, and client at a time.

about.headline: Hello, you can call me Sky.
about.description: I'm a dedicated Virtual Assistant and Customer Support Specialist with over 1 year and 7 months of hands-on experience. I help entrepreneurs and businesses run smoother by taking care of the behind-the-scenes work — so you can focus on what truly matters. From inbox zero to flawlessly managed calendars, I bring precision, warmth, and a can-do attitude to every task.

services.title: Calendar Management
services.description: Scheduling appointments, setting reminders, coordinating time zones, and ensuring your days flow with intention and efficiency. No more double-bookings or missed meetings.

services.title: Inbox Management
services.description: From filtering and labeling to drafting replies and flagging priorities — I keep your inbox clean, organized, and stress-free. Inbox zero is always the goal.

services.title: Travel Management
services.description: Flight bookings, hotel reservations, itinerary planning, and ground transportation. Business travel handled from A to Z, so you can arrive ready and refreshed.

services.title: Events Management
services.description: Coordinating virtual or in-person events — from vendor communication to logistics, RSVPs, and timelines. Every detail accounted for, every moment memorable.

services.title: Household Management
services.description: Vendor scheduling, bill reminders, errand coordination, and household admin tasks. Your personal life, running like clockwork behind the scenes.

services.title: Meeting Management
services.description: Agenda preparation, meeting notes, action item tracking, and follow-up coordination. Every meeting ends with clarity and accountability.

services.title: Basic Social Media Management
services.description: Scheduling posts, basic content curation, engagement monitoring, and keeping your brand presence consistent and professional across platforms.

contact.headline: Let's Work Together
contact.subtext: Available for remote work, long-term partnerships, and one-time projects. Let's talk about how I can support your business.
